name: Pathmark Local App Windows
release: v0.6.92 Google Sync and printable tasklist hierarchy
label: Google Sync and printable tasklist hierarchy
release_notes: Combines Google Calendar and Google Tasks into one sync flow, renames the hosted planner to Pathmark Planner, and improves printable tasklists so supporting time blocks sit underneath focus blocks without counting as project progress.
notes: Top-level navigation now uses Pathmark Planner rather than Planner.
Google Calendar and Google Tasks syncing are brought together under a combined Google Sync tab so planned time and checklist items are created or updated as a pair.

Combined sync treats Pathmark as the source of truth: existing linked Google Calendar events and Google Tasks are updated from Pathmark, while new items are created only when no stored Google ID exists.
The printable tasklist is presented as a paper fallback rather than the main working sync surface.
Supporting time blocks are indented below their focus block in tasklist selection and printable PDFs.
Printable tasklists now use Task and Notes columns, with notes showing cleaner area, parent, schedule, due date and time/duration context instead of duplicating the checklist title.
Dashboard week-at-a-glance now distinguishes Google Tasks items from printable tasklist rows.
release_name: Google Sync and printable tasklist hierarchy
